name: surface_to_projection
description: End-to-end pipeline: prepare a projection surface from photos, generate animated content with TextureFlow, subtract the background, and preview the simulated real-world view.

night_image.description: URL or path to nighttime photo with projector on (for surface detection).

day_image.description: URL or path to daytime photo of the same surface (triggers full detect+align+darken pipeline). Optional — omit for darken-only.

style_images.description: 1-6 style image URLs for TextureFlow content generation.

prompt.description: Creative prompt describing the desired projection content.

steps.description: Detect, align, and darken the projection surface from photos.
Mask out non-reflective regions (sky, etc.) to pure black using the prepared surface.

params.prompt: Remove all sky and non-reflective regions, replace them with pure black (#000000). Keep the building/surface texture intact.

steps.description: Generate animated projection content from style images.
Remove the background from the generated video to get purely additive light output.
Preview what the projection will look like on the actual surface.
